creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried upgrading to a newer libxml2 release and saw no change.

I rebuilt some of the ports with debug symbols and got this stack trace after multiple tries:

(lldb) bt
* thread #1, name = 'python3.11', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
  * frame #0: 0x00000008214ada1c libpython3.11.so.1.0`Py_INCREF(op=0x0000000000000000) at object.h:502:18
    frame #1: 0x00000008214ad92c libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyEval_Vector(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, func=0x0000292992fc79c0, locals=0x0000000000000000, args=0x0000292992f8bc98, argcount=2, kwnames=0x0000000000000000) at ceval.c:6421:9
    frame #2: 0x00000008213a32a4 libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyFunction_Vectorcall(func=0x0000292992fc79c0, stack=0x0000292992f8bc98, nargsf=2, kwnames=0x0000000000000000) at call.c:393:16
    frame #3: 0x00000008213a2ec1 libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyVectorcall_Call(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, func=(libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyFunction_Vectorcall at call.c:385), callable=0x0000292992fc79c0, tuple=0x0000292992f8bc80, kwargs=0x0000000000000000) at call.c:245:16
    frame #4: 0x00000008213a3078 libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyObject_Call(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, callable=0x0000292992fc79c0, args=0x0000292992f8bc80, kwargs=0x0000000000000000) at call.c:328:16
    frame #5: 0x00000008213a3465 libpython3.11.so.1.0`PyObject_CallObject(callable=0x0000292992fc79c0, args=0x0000292992f8bc80) at call.c:450:12
    frame #6: 0x00000008273303c3 libxml2mod.so`libxml_xmlErrorFuncHandler(ctx=0x0000000000000000, msg="") at libxml.c:1517:18
    frame #7: 0x000000082817ea73 libxml2.so.2`xmlParserPrintFileContextInternal(input=0x0000292993088500, channel=(libxml2mod.so`libxml_xmlErrorFuncHandler at libxml.c:1488), data=0x0000000000000000) at error.c:373:5
    frame #8: 0x000000082817f3d8 libxml2.so.2`xmlFormatError(err=0x0000292991db65d8, channel=(libxml2mod.so`libxml_xmlErrorFuncHandler at libxml.c:1488), data=0x0000000000000000) at error.c:595:9
    frame #9: 0x000000082817fa0a libxml2.so.2`xmlVRaiseError(schannel=0x0000000000000000, channel=(libxml2.so.2`xmlParserError at error.c:841), data=0x0000292991db6380, ctx=0x0000292991db6380, node=0x0000000000000000, domain=1, code=76, level=XML_ERR_FATAL, file=0x0000000000000000, line=1, str1="gui", str2="guiseq", str3=0x0000000000000000, int1=1, col=172, msg="", ap=0x00000008207a1000) at error.c:740:13
    frame #10: 0x00000008281b299d libxml2.so.2`xmlCtxtVErr(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380, node=0x0000000000000000, domain=XML_FROM_PARSER, code=XML_ERR_TAG_NAME_MISMATCH, level=XML_ERR_FATAL, str1="gui", str2="guiseq", str3=0x0000000000000000, int1=1, msg="", ap=0x00000008207a1000) at parserInternals.c:303:11
    frame #11: 0x00000008281b2622 libxml2.so.2`xmlCtxtErr(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380, node=0x0000000000000000, domain=XML_FROM_PARSER, code=XML_ERR_TAG_NAME_MISMATCH, level=XML_ERR_FATAL, str1="gui", str2="guiseq", str3=0x0000000000000000, int1=1, msg="") at parserInternals.c:350:5
    frame #12: 0x00000008281a4c63 libxml2.so.2`xmlFatalErrMsgStrIntStr(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380, error=XML_ERR_TAG_NAME_MISMATCH, msg="", str1="gui", val=1, str2="guiseq") at parser.c:335:5
    frame #13: 0x00000008281b0f7d libxml2.so.2`xmlParseEndTag2(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380, tag=0x0000292992a1aa30) at parser.c:9548:9
    frame #14: 0x00000008281a4d42 libxml2.so.2`xmlParseElementEnd(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380) at parser.c:9976:2
    frame #15: 0x00000008281a43f9 libxml2.so.2`xmlParseContentInternal(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380) at parser.c:9717:10
    frame #16: 0x00000008281a4648 libxml2.so.2`xmlParseElement(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380) at parser.c:9815:5
    frame #17: 0x00000008281a6260 libxml2.so.2`xmlParseDocument(ctxt=0x0000292991db6380) at parser.c:10599:2

    frame #21: 0x00000008213a2416 libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyObject_VectorcallTstate(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, callable=0x0000292992f44450, args=0x000029299196d660, nargsf=9223372036854775809, kwnames=0x0000000000000000) at pycore_call.h:90:16
    frame #22: 0x00000008213a2faa libpython3.11.so.1.0`PyObject_Vectorcall(callable=0x0000292992f44450, args=0x000029299196d660, nargsf=9223372036854775809, kwnames=0x0000000000000000) at call.c:299:12
    frame #23: 0x00000008214bd2fa libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyEval_EvalFrameDefault(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, frame=0x000029299196d5f8, throwflag=0) at ceval.c:4769:23
    frame #24: 0x00000008214adca5 libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyEval_EvalFrame(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, frame=0x000029299196d020, throwflag=0) at pycore_ceval.h:73:16
    frame #25: 0x00000008214ad9c6 libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyEval_Vector(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, func=0x00002929926954e0, locals=0x0000292991961a00, args=0x0000000000000000, argcount=0, kwnames=0x0000000000000000) at ceval.c:6434:24
    frame #26: 0x00000008214ad85a libpython3.11.so.1.0`PyEval_EvalCode(co=0x0000292991d3d800, globals=0x0000292991961a00, locals=0x0000292991961a00) at ceval.c:1148:21
    frame #27: 0x000000082151f5ce libpython3.11.so.1.0`run_eval_code_obj(tstate=0x00000008216b00f0, co=0x0000292991d3d800, globals=0x0000292991961a00, locals=0x0000292991961a00) at pythonrun.c:1741:9
    frame #28: 0x000000082151f512 libpython3.11.so.1.0`run_mod(mod=0x000029299293f960, filename=0x000029299196af60, globals=0x0000292991961a00, locals=0x0000292991961a00, flags=0x00000008207a3a28, arena=0x000029299188b3b0) at pythonrun.c:1762:19
    frame #29: 0x000000082151f229 libpython3.11.so.1.0`pyrun_file(fp=0x0000000824270bb0, filename=0x000029299196af60, start=257, globals=0x0000292991961a00, locals=0x0000292991961a00, closeit=1, flags=0x00000008207a3a28) at pythonrun.c:1657:15
    frame #30: 0x000000082151ed0f libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyRun_SimpleFileObject(fp=0x0000000824270bb0, filename=0x000029299196af60, closeit=1, flags=0x00000008207a3a28) at pythonrun.c:440:13
    frame #31: 0x000000082151e8dc libpython3.11.so.1.0`_PyRun_AnyFileObject(fp=0x0000000824270bb0, filename=0x000029299196af60, closeit=1, flags=0x00000008207a3a28) at pythonrun.c:79:15
    frame #32: 0x000000082154954e libpython3.11.so.1.0`pymain_run_file_obj(program_name=0x000029299196ac90, filename=0x000029299196af60, skip_source_first_line=0) at main.c:360:15
    frame #33: 0x0000000821548acc libpython3.11.so.1.0`pymain_run_file(config=0x0000000821696138) at main.c:379:15
    frame #34: 0x00000008215482f0 libpython3.11.so.1.0`pymain_run_python(exitcode=0x00000008207a3bf4) at main.c:605:21
    frame #35: 0x00000008215480f6 libpython3.11.so.1.0`Py_RunMain at main.c:684:5
    frame #36: 0x0000000821549680 libpython3.11.so.1.0`pymain_main(args=0x00000008207a3c98) at main.c:714:12
    frame #37: 0x0000000821549965 libpython3.11.so.1.0`Py_BytesMain(argc=27, argv=0x00000008207a3d70) at main.c:738:12
    frame #38: 0x00000000002017d2 python3.11`main(argc=27, argv=0x00000008207a3d70) at python.c:15:12
    frame #39: 0x0000000824104d74 libc.so.7`__libc_start1(argc=27, argv=0x00000008207a3d70, env=0x00000008207a3e50, cleanup=<unavailable>, mainX=(python3.11`main at python.c:14)) at libc_start1.c:172:7
    frame #40: 0x00000000002016d4 python3.11`_start at crt1_s.S:80



Something that sticks out is the xmlVRaiseError() call in frame 9.  Does it only happen randomly, or does it always happen and only randomly cause a core dump?
